extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET won solo from breakaway while FROOME survived a mechanical on penultimate Cat 1 climb, requiring full Sky team effort to close 40 seconds.
tactical_patterns: AG2R attacked immediately when Froome flatted on Cat 1 climb; no waiting when yellow jersey mechanicals mid-climb.
Sky burned entire team (Kwiatkowski, Henao, Nieve, Landa) closing 40 seconds, leaving Froome isolated for final climbs.
Martin bridged to dropped breakaway riders who cooperated despite GC threat, suggesting personal relationships override team tactics late-tour.
Yates attacking in final km signals Mitchelton targeting third week after conserving early stages.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Required full team to close 40s gap after flat on Cat 1, then wasted energy sprinting meaninglessly at finish
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Dropped back from lead group to pace Froome, confirming full domestique role despite earlier team tension speculation
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: Jumped to 5th GC at 1:12 despite crash injuries so severe he struggles entering team bus
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Attacking in finale signals form peaking for Alps third week after quiet first two weeks
